sourceTitle: AI and Generative Technology Use at CUIMC
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Columbia University provides access to HIPAA-compliant versions of OpenAI's ChatGPT and Microsoft Copilot, enabling our workforce to leverage these AI tools responsibly and compliantly.
